summary: Further harden model routing and environment configuration with post-mid-2025 policy alignment, resiliency improvements, and Symbiotic reference cleanup.
notes: Updated model configurations to post-mid-2025 policy with expanded backup coverage. Remapped provider ownership (MiniMax M2.5 under Zen, DeepSeek V3.2 under NVIDIA). Implemented resiliency hardening in scripts with command resolution fallbacks, profile-based env checks, per-step timeouts, and executable verification. Added atomic staged config sync with rollback/swap semantics. Fixed Google provider env placeholder consistency. Removed remaining Symbiotic security plugin references from documentation. All validation scripts pass with 0 failures, 0 warnings.
